## Description
Please include a summary of the change and which issue is fixed. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

**Fixes:** # (issue number)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Verification
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes.
- [ ] Passed `flutter analyze` (If frontend change)
- [ ] Passed `pytest` (If backend change)
- [ ] Verified local Docker Environment boots successfully.
- [ ] Documentation is updated to reflect these changes.

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the Conventional Commits standard.
- [ ] I have kept the Frontend and Backend changes completely isolated.
- [ ] I have commented my code in hard-to-understand areas.
